categoryDescription.identityRewrite: Canonical identity values applied to message metadata, generic payloads, and session fields.
categoryDescription.envRewrite: Canonical environment dimensions that replace the original client fingerprint.
categoryDescription.promptSanitization: Canonical values used when rewriting the injected <env> system prompt block.
categoryDescription.billingHeader: Attribution and billing metadata that is stripped or normalized before requests leave the machine.
categoryDescription.processMetrics: Canonical memory and heap ranges used to mask local hardware characteristics.
categoryDescription.zeroLoginClients: Local client onboarding and launcher details required to use the gateway without per-client login steps.
categoryDescription.centralizedOAuth: Gateway-owned OAuth token lifecycle and current credential readiness.
categoryDescription.instantStartup: Whether the app can start immediately from the cached access token before any refresh is needed.
categoryDescription.proxyAware: Proxy-related settings inherited by the local gateway process.
categoryDescription.telemetryLeakPrevention: Leak-prone headers and payload fields that are stripped or recursively sanitized.

items.shellRcRequired: Shell RC Change Required On Clients

values.degradedStartup: Start in degraded mode until refresh succeeds
values.refreshRequired: Refresh required before proxy requests succeed

settings.autostartDesc: Register CC Gateway as a login item so it can launch automatically.

settings.startupBehaviorDesc: Configure how CC Gateway behaves when your computer starts.
